name: connectable-web
description: Tools hub deployed at connectable-web.com — small standalone web tools (sprint velocity calculator, interval timer, …)

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && vite build && cp -R tools/interval-timer dist/tools/interval-timer && cp -R tools/cadence dist/tools/cadence && rm -f dist/tools/cadence/*.md && cp home/index.html dist/index.html && cp sitemap.xml robots.txt dist/ && mkdir -p dist/.well-known && cp .well-known/assetlinks.json dist/.well-known/assetlinks.json

author: htomaka
